data.title: Enso launches universal payment layer Checkout

data.title: Michael Saylor predicts Bitcoin will outgrow gold 10X as corporate adoption rises
data.description:

Saylor called Bitcoin the “next frontier” for national reserves and corporate treasuries. Saylor […]

data.title: Binance Announces BTC Staking APR Boost on Solv Protocol
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the platform has introduced a BTC Staking APR Boost campaign on Solv Protocol, offering users the opportunity to earn up to 2.5% in APR rewards in SOLV tokens. The promotion period is set from 2025-09-24 10:00 (UTC) to 2025-10-23 23:59 (UTC). During this period, users can stake BTC through Binance On-Chain Yields to participate in the campaign.

The BTC staking product on Solv Protocol offers various subscription durations, each with specific APR rates and limits. Users can choose from 15-day, 30-day, 60-day, and 90-day staking options, with APRs ranging from 1.1% to 2.5%. The minimum subscription limit is 0.05 BTC, while the maximum varies depending on the duration, with a special VIP option allowing up to 1,000 BTC for 60 days. Rewards are calculated daily but distributed at the end of the staking period to users' Spot Accounts.

Users can redeem their assets before maturity, but early redemption results in the loss of all accrued rewards. The redemption process is irreversible once confirmed, and users will receive their full balance within three days. Binance emphasizes that the APR rates are subject to change after the promotion period without prior notice. Users are encouraged to review the On-Chain Yields Terms, Terms of Use, and Risk Warning for more information before participating.

Binance On-Chain Yields provides users with access to high-yield opportunities without complex setups. However, it is a high-risk product with no guarantee of principal or returns, involving risks such as smart contract vulnerabilities and market volatility. Users are responsible for understanding these risks and ensuring compliance with regional restrictions and requirements.

data.title: Mechanism partner rebuts Tom Lee in a long article: The bullish argument for ETH is the most stupid financial illiterate argument in recent times
data.description: Mechanism Capital partner Andrew Kang published a post refuting Tom Lee's bullish thesis on ETH, calling it "idiotic" and the most financially illiterate he's seen recently. Andrew Kang refuted several of Lee's bullish arguments for ETH: - Stablecoin and RWA adoption. Kang argues that Ethereum network upgrades have improved transaction efficiency, and stablecoin and tokenization activity is also flowing to other public chains. The fees incurred by tokenizing low-liquidity assets are negligible (a $100 million bond traded once every two years only incurs a fee of approximately $0.1). - The digital oil analogy is fallacious. Kang argues that oil is a commodity, and its real price, adjusted for inflation, has remained within the same range for a century. Treating ETH as a commodity is not a bullish argument. - The institutional pledge capital theory. Kang argues that major banks do not hold ETH on their balance sheets and have not announced plans to do so. Banks do not stockpile gasoline due to ongoing energy consumption needs; they purchase it on demand when demand is negligible. Banks also do not invest in the custodians they use. The theory that ETH is equivalent to the total value of financial infrastructure companies. Kang believes this is a complete misunderstanding and delusion of the value accumulation mechanism. Technical analysis. Kang believes that objectively speaking, Ethereum has been in a multi-year range-bound trading range. After recently hitting the top of the range and failing to break through resistance, the technical analysis is actually bearish. The long-term ETH/BTC chart, while range-bound, has been primarily downward in recent years, and fundamentals do not support valuation growth. Ethereum's valuation is primarily due to a lack of financial literacy—much like XRP—but this valuation is not infinite. While macro liquidity supports ETH's market capitalization, without significant changes, its underperformance will continue.

data.title: Stablecoin market capitalization exceeds $294.5 billion, setting a new record high
data.description: Data from the DefiLlama website shows that the overall market capitalization of stablecoins has exceeded $294.5 billion, currently at $294.562 billion, a 7-day increase of 1.4%. USDT holds a 58.73% market share, with its market capitalization exceeding $173 billion, currently at $173.009 billion. USDC's market capitalization is $73.601 billion, with USDe, Dai, and USDS ranking third, fifth, respectively.

data.title: Bybit Announces Comprehensive Upgrade of Mantle (MNT) Functional Integration within the Platform
data.description: Cryptocurrency exchange Bybit has announced a comprehensive upgrade to Mantle (MNT) integration within the platform and has launched a dedicated MNT page, showcasing all MNT benefits and activities across the platform. This marks MNT as a strategic asset connecting Bybit's entire product line with the Mantle ecosystem. MNT has recently experienced explosive growth, reaching a new all-time high of $1.88 on September 23rd. MNT has become the largest ZK Rollup chain based on total locked value, exceeding $2 billion in total locked value, and has recently seen a 60% monthly price increase. According to the latest news on the official website, the current benefits enjoyed by MNT holders and users on Bybit include: - Institutional clients: enhanced leverage and higher capital efficiency - VIP Accelerator: MNT holders can quickly upgrade to VIP level - Platform Promotion: Up to 25% fee reduction for MNT transactions - Zero Fee: Within one month before October 23, 20 MNT-denominated spot trading pairs will be fee-free - Bybit Financial Management: Diversified financial management options such as MNT discounts, fixed savings, dual-currency products, etc. - Bybit Card: Exclusive additional rebates and fee reductions for MNT transactions To celebrate the completion of the ecological integration, Bybit will hold an exclusive live broadcast event "MNT Journey Starts Here: Unlocking Bybit's Full Channel" at 8:00 am (UTC) on September 26, providing users with a comprehensive guide to the latest strategies and platform applications.

data.title: Bitcoin News. Today: Bitcoin Bollinger Bands Hit Record Squeeze, Analysts Warn of ‘Volatility Storm’ Ahead
data.description: Key Takeaways:Bitcoin’s weekly Bollinger Bands are the tightest in history, signaling a looming volatility breakout.Analysts warn of a “significant volatility storm”, with scenarios ranging from a dip toward $100K to a bullish October surge.Historically, similar compression has preceded major upside breakouts, including BTC’s run to $122K in July.Record Bollinger Band CompressionBitcoin’s Bollinger Bands — a technical indicator that tracks volatility and potential price extremes — have tightened to their narrowest levels ever, according to crypto analyst Mr. Anderson.“When volatility compresses this tightly, expansion always follows,” the analyst said, adding that BTC typically tests outer bands quickly once volatility returns.CoinW’s chief strategy officer Nassar Achkar called the move the “calm before a significant volatility storm”, highlighting ETF inflows, seasonality, and negative funding rates as bullish drivers.Analysts Divided on DirectionWhile some expect upside, others caution that compression does not guarantee a bullish move.Hunters of Web3’s Langerius: “Compression this extreme rarely resolves quietly.”Glassnode’s CryptoVizArt: Argued that Bitcoin’s volatility naturally declines as it matures, calling the current squeeze “an observation without predictive value.”Tony Sycamore, IG Group: Believes BTC still needs time to “work off overbought readings” after strong 2025 gains.Historical Context: July and September SignalsBitcoin’s last major Bollinger Band squeeze came in early July when BTC traded near $108K. Within days, volatility spiked, and BTC hit an all-time high above $122K by mid-July, according to Cointelegraph.The bands tightened again in early September — their most extreme monthly compression since Bitcoin began trading.Uptober or Septembear?Traders are watching whether Bitcoin’s next move will be a final shakeout toward $100K or a seasonal October rally.Data from CoinGlass shows BTC has risen in 10 of the last 12 Octobers and 8 of the last 12 Q4s, reinforcing October’s reputation as “Uptober.”

data.title: TRON ecosystem PerpDEX SunPerp's cumulative trading volume exceeded 14.6 million USDT
data.description: According to official news, as of the seventh day of public beta testing for SunPerp, a decentralized perpetual contract exchange within the TRON ecosystem, the platform has surpassed 6,000 users and accumulated trading volume exceeding 14.6 million USDT. Notably, since SunPerp will use SUN as its platform token and use platform revenue for SUN buybacks and burns, on-chain SUN transactions have surged since the public beta began. On September 23rd, a single-day on-chain transfer volume of 9.27 billion SUN tokens was reached, valued at nearly $300 million.

data.title: Ju.com will launch the XPL/USDT trading pair at 22:00 tomorrow.
data.description: Ju.com will list XPL and open the XPL/USDT trading pair at 10:00 PM Beijing Time on September 25th. Plasma is a high-performance Layer 1 blockchain purpose-built for the stablecoin market. Plasma addresses the high fees, transaction failures, and poor user experience faced by existing blockchains in the $250 billion stablecoin market. Plasma offers several innovative solutions, including zero-fee USDT transfers, a custom gas token supporting stablecoin transaction fees, and the ultra-low-latency PlasmaBFT consensus mechanism. Furthermore, Plasma achieves EVM compatibility through Reth, building a scalable, censorship-resistant, stablecoin-centric settlement layer, providing enhanced infrastructure for the stablecoin ecosystem.

data.title: Three core proposals from the BTFS community have simultaneously entered the final stage
data.description: According to an official Twitter post, the BTFS technical community announced that three key proposals, BTIP-103, BTIP-104, and BTIP-105, have completed community review and are entering the final implementation phase. This upgrade will significantly improve network collaboration efficiency, storage convenience, and cross-environment compatibility, marking a new milestone for the BTFS distributed storage ecosystem.

data.title: Binance Wallet Launches Aster Trading Volume Points Bonus Campaign
data.description: Binance Wallet announced that starting at 12:00 PM (UTC+0) on September 24, 2025, users trading on the Aster dApp through Binance Wallet (Keyless) will receive an additional 10% increase in Aster Trading Volume Points. Points will be awarded every Monday based on valid transactions from the previous week (Monday to Sunday). The promotion ends at 11:59 PM (UTC+0) on October 5, 2025.
